message:
feat(fcp-store): add source diversity enforcement for symbol coverage

Implements min_source_diversity policy enforcement to prevent reconstruction
from a single compromised or unavailable node even when symbol count is
sufficient.

CoverageEvaluation changes:
- Add min_source_diversity check to meets_policy() - coverage now requires
  symbols to be distributed across at least N distinct nodes
- Add meets_diversity_for_reconstruction() helper combining availability
  check with diversity requirement
- Add diversity_deficit() to calculate how many additional nodes are needed
- Update all tests to include min_source_diversity: 0 in test policies

Test additions:
- diversity_enforcement test verifying:
  - Single node fails diversity requirement (min_source_diversity: 2)
  - Two nodes with same symbol count passes
  - diversity_deficit() calculates correct shortfall

This enables operators to require geographic or failure-domain diversity
for high-value objects, preventing single-point-of-failure during
reconstruction even when erasure coding provides redundancy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
